test_environment.storage_backend: Local filesystem at C:/dev; Windows filesystem type unavailable because volume query returned Access denied

test_cases.description: Persistence across restart — actor registered pre-restart is present and ACTIVE post-restart
test_cases.trigger_condition: Register actor, perform process restart, query actor
test_cases.expected_outcome: Actor present with state ACTIVE after restart
test_cases.pass_criterion: Actor retrievable by actor_id, state ACTIVE, no reseeding required
test_cases.notes: Registry object re-instantiation tested; full process restart was not executed.

test_cases.description: State transition enforcement — illegal state skip (PENDING → RETIRED) is rejected
test_cases.trigger_condition: Attempt transition from PENDING directly to RETIRED
test_cases.expected_outcome: Transition rejected, actor state remains PENDING
test_cases.pass_criterion: Error returned; actor state unchanged at PENDING
test_cases.notes: PENDING to RETIRED skip rejected and state preserved.

test_cases.description: Submission rejection by state — SUSPENDED actor receives 403
test_cases.trigger_condition: Pipeline submission from a SUSPENDED actor
test_cases.expected_outcome: 403 ACTOR_UNREGISTERED returned; rejection lineage record written
test_cases.notes: Inactive-state lookup tested; pipeline 403 and rejection lineage integration not exercised.

test_cases.description: Registry mutation lineage — every state transition generates a lineage record
test_cases.expected_outcome: Lineage record written with actor_id, mutation type, operator
test_cases.pass_criterion: Record present, action: MUTATED, all required fields populated
test_cases.notes: Registration and activation produced MUTATED records.

test_cases.description: actor_id format enforcement — malformed actor_id rejected at registration
test_cases.trigger_condition: Registration attempt with actor_id not matching ACT-YYYYMMDD-NNNN
test_cases.pass_criterion: Error returned; actor absent from registry

test_cases.description: Lookup performance — O(1) average lookup in 10,000-actor registry
test_cases.trigger_condition: Seed registry with 10,000 actors; run 100 random lookups
test_cases.notes: Single lookup exercised; 10,000-actor registry and 100-trial <=5ms benchmark not executed.

test_cases.description: Registry export — full actor list returned with no credentials exposed
test_cases.expected_outcome: All actors returned; no credentials or secrets in output
test_cases.pass_criterion: Export contains all actor fields; credential fields absent or redacted
test_cases.notes: Export contained actor records and no credential fields.

test_cases.description: Bootstrap credential rotation — old credential rejected after rotation
test_cases.trigger_condition: Rotate bootstrap credential after registry is seeded with an ACTIVE human actor
test_cases.expected_outcome: Old credential returns 403; new credential active
test_cases.pass_criterion: Old credential rejected; new credential accepted
test_cases.notes: Credential rotation tested, but not after seeding an ACTIVE human actor.

test_cases.description: RETIRED actor permanent block — RETIRED actor cannot submit and state cannot be changed
test_cases.trigger_condition: Retire an actor; attempt submission; attempt state change from RETIRED
test_cases.expected_outcome: 403 on submission; state change from RETIRED rejected permanently
test_cases.pass_criterion: Submission rejected; no state transition from RETIRED possible
test_cases.notes: Terminal transition tested; retired-actor pipeline submission and 403 were not exercised.

_additional_test_cases_note: Append any implementation-side test cases beyond the spec-defined set below. total_cases, passed, failed, skipped must reflect all cases including additions.

additional_test_cases.notes: Implementation-side regression or baseline test; not a substitute for spec-defined gate case.

anomalies: Pytest full suite passed 45/45, but strict gate mapping identified spec cases not exercised at required production fidelity. Production target equivalence and Windows filesystem type are unverified. executed_by uses candidate harness actor ID; no durable production actor binding was available.
